key_evidence.RT2-BLOCK-001: Primary delta Spearman +0.136833 is matched/exceeded by future_leaky +0.231817, ipv_time_shuffle +0.196823, counterpart_swap +0.168441, role_flip +0.136833, sign_flip +0.136833; state_shuffle/wrong_state degradation failed.
key_evidence.RT2-BLOCK-002: replication2 status REPRODUCED_WITH_MINOR_DIFFS; corrected N=53; independent tuned delta Spearman 0.054669; reported-alpha refit delta Spearman 0.136833.
key_evidence.RT2-BLOCK-003: S1 and S2 duplicate the primary 53 cells; S3 has n=6 with null/reverse behavior; safe_subset_agreement_count=2 is vacuous.
key_evidence.RT2-BLOCK-004: Reports now state suggestive, nonsignificant (p=0.30, CI includes 0), non-generalizing (LOSO +0.017), non-IPV-specific favorable direction; robustness not established.
key_evidence.settled_conclusion: No robust incremental predictive utility relative to the prespecified kinematic+safety baseline was demonstrated.

acceptance_criteria_results.wording_scan: pass after removing literal overclaim-prone phrases

spec_deviations: No numeric result tables, freeze files, or feature tables were changed.
